author: doll-agent
content: Verified done. Handoff from 2026-04-09 05:26 documented the actual fix: 47-error cascade under --all-features came from a no_std/std feature-gate inversion, bitrotted static_shape.rs (used Vec/format!/std::fmt without gating), and duplicate into_dyn methods. All three layers were addressed; cargo check --workspace --all-features now passes cleanly (just verified). Issue title was misleading — the breakage wasn't actually about a missing Debug derive, it was the feature-gate cascade. The cargo --all-features check works today.
